visual_description: A medium shot captures a man in a dark suit and tie, wearing an earpiece, standing in a dimly lit control room. He has a serious, focused expression as he looks slightly off-camera. In the background, other people are seated at computer stations, and computer monitors display various data and graphics. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score, creating a mood of suspense and seriousness. The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man in a light-colored shirt, looking down with a concerned and somber expression. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" watermark remains in the same position. A man speaks in a low, firm, and decisive voice, stating, "就这样" (Just like this). His tone is calm but carries a sense of finality and resignation, as if accepting an unpleasant but necessary outcome. The shot returns to the first man in the suit. The camera is now in a tighter close-up on his face, emphasizing his intense and determined gaze. The earpiece is still in place. The background is dark and indistinct. The "风行网" watermark is still present
